Explanation: Using `ACCOUNT_ENTITY.fields()` selects all columns from the ACCOUNT_ENTITY table, which fetches unnecessary data and couples the code to the table schema. Explicitly list only the columns needed for the AccountEntity mapping.
Using `selectFrom(ACCOUNT_ENTITY)` selects all columns from the table, which may retrieve more data than necessary. Replace with an explicit `select()` specifying only the required columns.

Using `select()` without arguments selects all columns from all joined tables (ACCOUNT_ENTITY and POST_ENTITY), which retrieves unnecessary data. Explicitly specify only the columns needed for the result.
